flavorText: Saboteurs weaponize stealth, disruption, traps, and battlefield misdirection through hidden devices and careful planning.

features.description: Build hidden tools and trap logic that let you infiltrate, disable, and misdirect before enemies understand what is happening.
You always have a set of stealth, concealment, and misdirection formulae available.
A successful disruption opens the next angle—your devices reward preparation by cascading pressure across a turn or zone.
Your entries and extractions become cleaner, quieter, and more likely to leave the enemy line compromised before the fight begins.
At your peak, hidden setup and exact timing let you dictate the opening exchange of major encounters.

saboteur-ghost-tools.summary: Turn subtle gear and hidden rigging into a true infiltration toolkit.
saboteur-ghost-tools.description: Ghost Tools should make the subclass feel smart, patient, and dangerous. You are winning before initiative by preparing the angle no one else noticed.

saboteur-infiltration-spells.summary: Your granted spells keep stealth, concealment, and setup pressure online every day.

saboteur-chain-reaction.summary: Successful disruptions create follow-up pressure instead of ending as one-off tricks.

saboteur-silent-breach.summary: Your team gets cleaner entries, exits, and setup windows thanks to disciplined sabotage craft.

saboteur-perfect-ambush.summary: Your endgame sabotage tools let you shape the opening of a fight almost like a script.
